$comment: D-P14 predict-matter-cost synthesis playbook (Phase 1 task 060). This is the canonical Insights-mode playbook for the questions-as-playbooks pattern per D-54 + SPEC §3.4.3. Unlike universal-ingest (which has a fixed sequence realized in code), this playbook is data-driven (Dataverse sprk_analysisplaybook + sprk_playbooknodes) because future synthesis questions will be authored against the same node executors with different graphs. Deploy via: scripts/Deploy-Playbook.ps1 -DefinitionFile <this-file> after az login.
$comment-publication: Published as a Dataverse sprk_analysisplaybook row + N sprk_playbooknodes rows. The IInsightsAi.AnswerQuestionAsync facade resolves Question (Guid) -> playbook row -> nodes via INodeService.GetNodesAsync; PlaybookOrchestrationService.ExecuteAppOnlyAsync drains the stream; InsightsPlaybookExecutionCache (D-P13) extracts the final ReturnInsightArtifactNode output as the cached InsightArtifact.
$comment-deviation: Synthesis LLM call uses AgentServiceNodeExecutor (action_type=60) rather than AiAnalysisNodeExecutor (action_type=0). Rationale: AiAnalysisNodeExecutor requires NodeExecutionContext.Document with extracted text (it bridges to IAnalysisToolHandler which is document-bound). Synthesis playbooks have NO document — they compose retrieved evidence from prior nodes. AgentServiceNodeExecutor accepts pure prompt + tenantId via ConfigJson, matching synthesis semantics. The task 060 invocation guidance suggests AiAnalysisNodeExecutor in the abstract; the existing executor wiring requires the substitution. The synthesis prompt + node graph + evidence-sufficiency contract are unchanged.

playbook.name: predict-matter-cost@v1
playbook.description: Insights-mode synthesis playbook (D-P14). Predicts likely total cost + duration of a new legal matter by composing Live Facts (current matter scope) + cohort Observations (from comparable matters via spaarke-insights-index) + applicable Confirmed Precedents. Evidence-sufficiency rule comparableMatters.min=12 routes to DeclineToFindNode on insufficient cohort. Cached for 5 min per D-P13.
playbook.$comment-type: sprk_playbooktype=0 (AiAnalysis) — closest existing semantic in the option set (range 0-4: AiAnalysis/Workflow/Notification/Notification/Hybrid). Phase 1 discriminator for Insights vs Analysis is isSystemPlaybook=true + the '@v1' naming convention. Phase 1.5 may add an explicit Insights value to the type option set AND map sprk_playbookmode=1 (NodeBased) via script; the current Deploy-Playbook.ps1 does not read sprk_playbookmode so adding it here would be a no-op.

sprk_configjson.$comment-cacheTtl: 5 minutes per D-P13 (matches InsightsPlaybookExecutionCache.DefaultTtl). The orchestrator reads this and passes as Ttl override to the cache.
sprk_configjson.$comment-evidenceRule: Mirrors EvidenceSufficiencyNode 'checkSufficiency' config below. Recorded on the playbook record so admin tooling can audit evidence rules without traversing node configs.
sprk_configjson.insufficientEvidenceTemplate: Cannot predict cost: only {have} comparable matters were found (need {need} per rule '{rule}' from {from}). {reason}
sprk_configjson.$comment-insufficientTemplate: D-49 LAVERN Pattern #7 structured template. Tokens: {have}={cohortCount}, {need}=12, {rule}='comparableMatters.min', {from}='retrieveCohortObservations', {reason}=human-readable explanation.

matterId.description: Subject matter Guid in matter:M-XXXX form (passed via Subject field at runtime, not Parameters)

matterType.description: Optional: narrow cohort retrieval by matter type (e.g., 'IP licensing')

dealSizeBucket.description: Optional: narrow cohort retrieval by deal size bucket

opposingCounsel.description: Optional: surface relevant Precedents by opposing counsel

playbook.$comment-scopes: Insights-mode playbooks bypass the legacy skill/action/knowledge/tool resolution — the node executors are auto-discovered by NodeExecutorRegistry via SupportedActionTypes. Scopes left empty intentionally; the seed script tolerates empty arrays per resolution-loop guards.

nodes.name: resolveLiveFacts
nodes.$comment-actionCode: Insights Engine r2 Wave B (D-01 path-b): action row INS-FACT in sprk_analysisaction, sprk_actiontypeid -> '80 - Live Fact Resolver' with sprk_executoractiontype=80. Deploy-Playbook.ps1 line 673 resolves actionCode -> sprk_actionid FK at deploy time.

configJson.subject: matter:{{matterId}}
configJson.$comment: Resolves current matter Live Facts (attorney, matter type, client, opposing counsel, current spend, duration) via ILiveFactResolver. Template variable {{matterId}} substituted from Parameters at runtime.

nodes.name: retrieveCohortObservations
nodes.$comment-actionCode: Insights Engine r2 Wave B: INS-IDXR action row; lookup '90 - Index Retrieve' with sprk_executoractiontype=90.

configJson.filter: predicate eq 'outcomeCategory' or predicate eq 'settlementAmount' or predicate eq 'outcomeDate' or predicate eq 'matterDurationDays'
configJson.$comment-requireEvidence: false here because empty cohort is handled by EvidenceSufficiencyNode (with structured gap analysis), not by IndexRetrieveNode's hard fail. Setting true would mask the decline path.

nodes.name: retrievePrecedents
nodes.$comment-actionCode: Insights Engine r2 Wave B: same INS-IDXR action row as retrieveCohortObservations (two nodes reference one action row — different configJson distinguishes the queries).

configJson.$comment-requireEvidence: false — having zero applicable Precedents is normal; the synthesis prompt handles 'no precedents' explicitly.

nodes.name: checkSufficiency
nodes.$comment-actionCode: Insights Engine r2 Wave B: INS-EVID action row; lookup '100 - Evidence Sufficiency' with sprk_executoractiontype=100.

rules.name: comparableMatters
rules.$comment-minCount: Phase 1 acceptance bar per SPEC-phase-1-minimum.md §6. Below 12 cohort matches yields verdict=insufficient + structured gap (have:N, need:12-N, rule:'comparableMatters.min').

nodes.name: synthesize
nodes.$comment-actionCode: Insights Engine r2 Wave B: INS-AGNT action row (Insights — Agent Service Synthesis); lookup '60 - Agent Service' with sprk_executoractiontype=60.
nodes.$comment-actionType: ActionType.AgentService = 60; handled by AgentServiceNodeExecutor. Used here (not AiAnalysisNodeExecutor) because synthesis composes prior-node outputs into a prompt — no document bound. See top-of-file $comment-deviation.

configJson.$comment-prompt-source: Synthesis prompt content lives in sprk_analysisaction[INS-AGNT@v1].sprk_systemprompt (Wave C2 task 021 migrated predict-matter-cost-synthesis.v1.txt → row; the .txt file was deleted in Wave C-G4 task 022). AgentServiceNodeExecutor reads the prompt at runtime via the actionCode FK; template placeholders {{liveFacts}}, {{cohortObservations}}, {{precedents}} are resolved by PlaybookOrchestrationService.ApplyConfigJsonTemplates from prior-node OutputVariables.
configJson.$comment-branching: This node executes ONLY when checkSufficiency.verdict == 'sufficient'. The orchestrator's branch routing is handled by checkSufficiency's selectedBranch output + the engine's downstream node skip logic (Wave C1 Gap #2 patch: a node whose upstream EvidenceSufficiency emitted 'insufficient' is skipped per EvidenceSufficiencyNode docs).

nodes.name: groundCitations
nodes.$comment-actionCode: Insights Engine r2 Wave B: INS-GRND action row; lookup '70 - Grounding Verify' with sprk_executoractiontype=70.

configJson.$comment: Mechanically verifies every evidence[].snippet against the source observations' verbatim text. Failed citations are stripped (not annotated) before ReturnInsightArtifactNode emits the final InferenceArtifact. The D-A23 EvidenceGuard downstream then enforces the 12-citation minimum after stripping.

nodes.name: ReturnInsightArtifactNode
nodes.$comment-name: MUST be exactly 'ReturnInsightArtifactNode' (case-sensitive). InsightsPlaybookExecutionCache.ReturnInsightArtifactNodeName is hardcoded to this string for stream draining — see InsightsPlaybookExecutionCache.cs line 59.
nodes.$comment-actionCode: Insights Engine r2 Wave B: INS-RART action row; lookup '120 - Return Insight Artifact' with sprk_executoractiontype=120.

configJson.subject: matter:{{matterId}}
configJson.$comment-evidenceGuard: allowEmptyEvidence=false enforces D-A23 / D-48 EvidenceGuard: an empty evidence[] after GroundingVerifyNode stripping yields node-level EVIDENCE_REQUIRED error. The orchestrator's null-artifact handling (InsightsOrchestrator.AnswerQuestionAsync line 130 onward) surfaces this as a DeclineResponse to Zone B.

nodes.name: declineInsufficient
nodes.$comment-actionCode: Insights Engine r2 Wave B: INS-DECL action row; lookup '110 - Decline to Find' with sprk_executoractiontype=110.
nodes.$comment-actionType: ActionType.DeclineToFind = 110; handled by DeclineToFindNode (task 022). Insufficient-evidence branch.

configJson.explanationTemplate: Cannot predict cost: only {have} comparable matters were found (need {need} per rule 'comparableMatters.min' from retrieveCohortObservations). Phase 1 requires at least 12 comparable matters in the tenant's spaarke-insights-index cohort.
suggestedActions: Broaden the matter-type filter (e.g., 'IP' instead of 'IP licensing')
Remove the dealSizeBucket constraint if present
Author a Spaarke Precedent for this matter pattern so future predictions have an authoritative anchor (POST /api/insights/admin/precedents)
Ingest more historical matter documents into the tenant so the cohort grows
configJson.$comment: This node fires ONLY when checkSufficiency.verdict == 'insufficient'. Emits a DeclineResponse rather than an InsightArtifact — the cache's DrainEngineStreamAsync returns null (no ReturnInsightArtifactNode output), the orchestrator's null-handling returns Declined(...) to Zone B. Phase 1.5+ may add a separate ReturnDeclineNode for stream-level structured decline propagation; Phase 1 piggybacks on the null-artifact path.

dependsOnGraph.$comment: Documentation-only view of the dependency graph. Realized in Dataverse via sprk_dependsonjson on each node row. The seed script Deploy-Playbook.ps1 sets these from the 'dependsOn' arrays above.

acceptanceCriteria.$comment: Mirrors task 060 POML <acceptance-criteria>. Used as documentation + as fixture targets for PredictMatterCostPlaybookTests.cs.
criteria: Playbook publishes successfully as Insights-mode (sprk_analysisplaybook row + 8 sprk_playbooknodes rows in Dataverse, name='predict-matter-cost@v1', isSystemPlaybook=true)
Sufficient-evidence test: 15 mock comparable matters → IInsightsAi.AnswerQuestionAsync returns InsightsAgentResult.Success(artifact) with InferenceArtifact carrying ≥12 evidence refs
Insufficient-evidence test: 5 mock comparable matters → returns InsightsAgentResult.Declined(decline) with MinimumEvidenceNeeded carrying gap analysis (need ≥7 more)
GroundingVerifyNode strips one synthetic fabricated citation from synthesis output
Precedent citation: applicable Confirmed Precedent in retrievePrecedents output → cited in InferenceArtifact.evidence[] as precedent://prec:... ref
D-P13 cache hit on second identical invocation (verified via Mock<IInsightsPlaybookExecutionCache>.Verify(Times.Once) on engineInvocation factory)
